subcodes.title: Words to a Mohammedan Sheikh, spoken on 1913-12-16
subcodes.first_line: My friends! How long, how long these prejudices? How long this dogmatic superiority? How long this fanatical attitude?
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @blind imitation [taqlid], @fanaticism and hatred
